summary: Iteration 8 Testing COMPLETED: My Account & Portfolio UI/UX Updates. 11/11 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright UI testing.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/geo/countries returns list of countries
2. GET /api/geo/states?country_id=ca returns states for Canada
3. GET /api/geo/cities?state_id=on returns cities for Ontario
4. GET /api/member/sectors returns 6 sectors
5. GET /api/member/industries returns industries
6. GET /api/member/companies returns companies
7. POST /api/auth/login with admin@consultant.com / Admin123! succeeds
8. GET /api/member/my-mentor works when authenticated (returns null for admin)
9. POST /api/member/portfolios accepts rank and cost fields in holdings
10. DELETE /api/member/portfolios/{id} works for owner
11. /my-account/login page loads and Sign In works with admin credentials
12. /my-account/membership-profile page loads with 3 tabs (General Info, Social Links, Activities)
13. MembershipProfile has cascading Country/State/City selects in edit mode
14. MembershipProfile Biography modal does NOT have Cover Image field (only Summary and Biography)
15. /my-account/mentorship-profile page loads and displays 'No mentor assigned' message
16. /my-account/portfolios page loads with My Portfolios and Shared Portfolios tabs
17. /my-account/portfolios/new page loads with Rank and Cost columns in holdings
18. Portfolio form has single-row layout for holdings
19. Portfolio form has NO Activities section
20. Portfolio form has Delete Portfolio button when editing with confirmation dialog
21. Portfolio detail page shows all 10 columns: Rank, % Portfolio, Current Value, Symbol, Security, Sector, Industry, Share Price, Cost, # Shares
22. Portfolio detail page shows 3 pie charts: By Sector, By Industry, Portfolio Balance
23. Portfolio detail page shows Edit button for owner
24. Date formatting: mm/dd/yyyy (e.g., 01/15/2025)
25. Currency formatting: $0.00 with commas (e.g., $6,611.20)
26. Percentage formatting: 0.00% (e.g., 24.37%)

test_credentials.note: Admin account can access both admin and member endpoints

seed_data_creation: None - used existing geo data (countries, states, cities) and sectors/industries/companies
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 features fully tested. Key implementations verified: (1) MembershipProfile.js has cascading Country/State/City selects using geoAPI, Biography modal has only Summary and Biography fields (no Cover Image), (2) MentorshipProfile.js properly handles null mentor with nice empty state UI, (3) PortfolioForm.js has Rank and Cost columns in holdings, single-row layout, Delete button with confirmation dialog, no Activities section, (4) PortfolioDetail.js has 10 table columns, 3 pie charts (Sector, Industry, Balance), Edit button hidden for non-owners, (5) PortfolioList.js has mm/dd/yyyy dates, $0.00 currencies, HTML stripped descriptions. All formatting follows requirements: dates as mm/dd/yyyy, currencies as $0.00, percentages as 0.00%.

membership_profile: Cascading Country/State/City selects in edit mode
Biography modal has Summary and Biography fields only
Biography modal does NOT have Cover Image field
mentorship_profile: Displays 'No mentor assigned' message when mentor_id is null
Nice empty state UI with icon and helpful text
portfolio_form: Delete Portfolio button with confirmation dialog
portfolio_detail: 10 columns: Rank, % Portfolio, Current Value, Symbol, Security, Sector, Industry, Share Price, Cost, # Shares
3 pie charts: By Sector, By Industry, Portfolio Balance
Edit button visible for owner only
